entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange for CUBE Chain with substantial historical trading volume but no current TVL in the reviewed protocol data.
entity.notes: HEI uses inactive rather than dead because reviewed sources show no current TVL and a dead-adapter registry signal but no primary-source terminal shutdown notice.

evidence.title: Capricorn Finance protocol profile
evidence.notes: Profile records historical DEX volume and no current TVL for the reviewed period.

evidence.title: DefiLlama dead adapter registry
evidence.notes: Capricorn Finance appears in the adapter repository dead-adapter registry; HEI treats this as an inactivity signal rather than sufficient proof of terminal shutdown.
